name: Biome1_Island
comment: v9 (2026-06-12, ISLAND PIVOT - author decision): the BIG ISLAND IS GONE. The whole run = small maldive islets (M1-M4 unchanged from v8) + ONE final island: the old Citadel slot renamed 'Final', now its own scaled-up sand lens (~9-11k radius = ~1/4 of the old 40k land_radius) with A6_Villa dead-center on a low 12 m plateau, moderate slopes (lens run_scale 1.25 -> ~22 deg max mid-slope, beaches all around, NOTHING cliff-like). Removed: island dome/cape/cliff+strata, serpentine roads, G1/G2/G3 guard slots + shoulder waypoint, citadel stairs (the author removes the stair flight actors inside Lvl_A6_Villa), coast cuts. Procedural target this enables: scatter islets along an author-drawn curve, drop the final island at the end (layout editor rework pending - the old editor UI still assumes the dome/serpentine and is stale until then).

landscape.extent_note: 201600x201600 centered on origin; create at location (-100800,-100800,-2000)

slots.note: toss ORIGIN over water on the M1 axis (author 2026-06-11: pier ahead in the poster shot); RunLaunchPoint is author-placed
player lands here from the sea toss
lighthouse = early-chain landmark; chain heads WEST (CCW in UE view)

the FINAL LOCATION island at the end of the chain (continues the CCW curve past M4): villa dead-center on a 12 m plateau, run_scale 1.7 stretches the lens to ~11k radius (visibly bigger than M4) at a ~17 deg shoulder ('умеренно полого, не скала' - author 2026-06-12). yaw derived: entrance -Y faces M4. Permanent field until the gate opens (gate rule TBD - guards are gone).

rules.maldive_model: AUTHOR SPEC 2026-06-11 (+pivot 2026-06-12): each islet = a micro-island barely bigger than its arena (sand-lens profile: glass-flat arena footprint, convex C2 shoulder straight under the waterline), arena DEAD-CENTER, open water between islands MANDATORY. The final island is the SAME lens model scaled up (bigger footprint + run_scale), not a different terrain type.
rules.maldive_heights_note: gentle rise then settle: M1 500 / M2 540 / M3 1220 / M4 2150 / Final 1200 (author 2026-06-12: final arena LOW, no climb drama)
rules.budget_note: start->M1 is the BALLISTIC TOSS (~7000 uu), not a valve; islet hops ~16-18k path per the author's trajectory
rules.terrain_note: GENTLE everywhere (author: 'полого везде, пляж вместо обрыва; умеренно полого, без скал'): wide beach aprons, convex lens shoulders, no raised rims, no empty pad discs, no cliffs anywhere
